blindness_note: Hidden method identity: the evaluator is not shown M1/M3, model, temperature, prompt, source filename, or generation pipeline. Visible directional role: Reference Concept versus Transformation Candidate.

displayed_cards.role_instruction: Use this concept only as the reference point for judging preservation, retention, MVP improvement, overclaim removal, and semantic drift.

candidate.title: Sleep Sentinel
candidate.target_user: Light sleepers suffering from screen light overstimulation
candidate.problem_or_desire: Late night fidgeting and phone reliance impacting transition to REM cycles
candidate.core_concept: Audio-only tactical adventure navigable through binary haptic pulses and voice commands while keeping the eyes fully closed (phone screen brightness reduced to black).
candidate.proposed_approach: Binaural storytelling using spatial audio to indicate direction; user must verbally command left, right, or push maneuvers to solve escape puzzles while lying in darkness.
candidate.prototype_scope: Calibration of gyroscope-to-rotation mapping for selecting directions within a simple 3x3 audio maze.

displayed_cards.role_instruction: Assess how this candidate changes, preserves, narrows, or operationalizes the Reference Concept. Do not assume this transformation is automatically better.

candidate.title: Creative Brief Translator
candidate.problem_or_desire: The information gap between high-level client conceptual needs and individual production brief quality.
candidate.core_concept: Agents that 'shadow' planning calls to autonomously document technical requirements for contractors.
candidate.proposed_approach: Agent analyzes collaborative whiteboard output and transcript data to fill structured standardized agency brief templates.
candidate.prototype_scope: Template ingestion for graphic design asset requests derived from transcribed meetings.

candidate.title: Creative Brief Translator
candidate.problem_or_desire: The information gap between high-level client conceptual needs and individual production brief quality.
candidate.core_concept: Automated extraction of technical requirements from unstructured meeting transcripts into structured templates.
candidate.proposed_approach: A tool that processes uploaded meeting transcripts to populate a standardized creative brief template.
candidate.prototype_scope: A web interface where users upload a transcript and receive a pre-filled brief based on a fixed template. | Select target creative brief template; Develop prompt engineering for transcript extraction; Build simple file upload UI; Implement template export (e.g., PDF/Docx)

candidate.title: Mind Mapping Mycology
candidate.target_user: Project managers needing mental organizational structure
candidate.problem_or_desire: Hard-to-track complex logical connections between project silos
candidate.core_concept: An isometric management simulation where project nodes propagate resources like fungal mycelium, forcing identification of 'thin' link areas through intuitive visual obstruction.
candidate.proposed_approach: Mapping abstract work dependencies to subterranean connections; broken/weak linkages result in wilting the surface network of crops.
candidate.prototype_scope: Visualization engine displaying connections between one parent and three child entities.

displayed_cards.role_instruction: Assess how this candidate changes, preserves, narrows, or operationalizes the Reference Concept. Do not assume this transformation is automatically better.

candidate.title: Regulatory Change Response Architect
candidate.target_user: Food and beverage quality assurance heads
candidate.problem_or_desire: Drastic differences in health safety manual implementation when regulations shift locally.
candidate.core_concept: Mapping new legislation changes to existing internal standard operating procedure documents using diff identification.
candidate.proposed_approach: Monitoring governmental regulatory feeds for trigger keywords and automatically highlighting modified procedure steps for policy-drafter human rewrite.
candidate.prototype_scope: Dashboard tool for monitoring two specific municipality codes impacting packaging labeling.

displayed_cards.role_instruction: Assess how this candidate changes, preserves, narrows, or operationalizes the Reference Concept. Do not assume this transformation is automatically better.

candidate.title: Collaborative Cold-Brew Barista Collective

candidate.title: Institutional Compost Loyalty Loop
candidate.problem_or_desire: High workplace organic waste volume with no benefit or impact reflection
candidate.core_concept: Closing the loop on office coffee waste by returning composted material to the office environment.
